Scenario: Verify petty cash page loads successfully
Precondition: User is logged in with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Login with valid credentials\n2. Navigate to petty cash page
Expected Result: Petty cash page loads with heading "Petty Cash" and 3 tabs (Funds/Transactions/Requests)

Scenario: Verify funds tab is visible
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check for Funds tab
Expected Result: Funds tab is visible and active by default

Scenario: Verify transactions tab is visible
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check for Transactions tab
Expected Result: Transactions tab is visible

Scenario: Verify requests tab is visible
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check for Requests tab
Expected Result: Requests tab is visible

Scenario: Verify total fund amount is displayed
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check summary section
Expected Result: Total fund amount is displayed (e.g. ₹25

Scenario: Verify available balance is displayed
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check summary section
Expected Result: Available balance is displayed (e.g. ₹24

Scenario: Verify pending requests count is displayed
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check summary section
Expected Result: Pending requests count is displayed (e.g. 3)

Scenario: Verify transactions count is displayed
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check summary section
Expected Result: Transactions count is displayed (e.g. 10)

Scenario: Verify active funds count is displayed
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check summary section
Expected Result: Active funds count is displayed (e.g. 7)

Scenario: Verify create fund button is present
Precondition: User is on petty cash funds tab
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check for Create Fund button
Expected Result: Create Fund button is visible

Scenario: Verify user can create a fund
Precondition: User is on petty cash funds tab
Steps:
1. Click Create Fund
2. Enter fund name
3. Enter initial amount
4. Enter new balance threshold
5. Enter notes
6. Select project site
7. Click Save
Expected Result: New fund is created successfully

Scenario: Verify fund list displays all funds
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. View funds tab
Expected Result: All funds are listed with name

Scenario: Verify fund search field is present
Precondition: User is on petty cash funds tab
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check for search field
Expected Result: Fund search field is visible

Scenario: Verify user can search funds by name
Steps: 1. Enter fund name in search field\n2. Press Enter
Expected Result: Funds list is filtered to show matching funds

Scenario: Verify user can edit a fund
Steps: 1. Click edit icon on a fund\n2. Modify fund name or amount\n3. Click Save
Expected Result: Fund is updated successfully

Scenario: Verify user can recharge a fund
Steps: 1. Click recharge button on a fund\n2. Enter recharge amount\n3. Click Save
Expected Result: Fund balance is increased by recharge amount

Scenario: Verify user can delete a fund
Steps: 1. Click delete icon on a fund\n2. Confirm deletion
Expected Result: Fund is deleted successfully

Scenario: Verify transaction table columns
Steps: 1. Navigate to transactions tab\n2. Check table headers
Expected Result: Table shows: Transaction ID

Scenario: Verify request marked as paid appears in transactions
Precondition: A request is approved and marked as paid
Steps: 1. Approve a request\n2. Mark as paid\n3. Navigate to transactions tab
Expected Result: The paid request appears in transaction table

Scenario: Verify fund recharge appears in transactions
Steps: 1. Recharge a fund\n2. Navigate to transactions tab
Expected Result: The recharge appears in transaction table

Scenario: Verify approve request button is present
Steps: 1. Navigate to requests tab\n2. View a pending request
Expected Result: Approve button is visible on pending requests

Scenario: Verify reject request button is present
Steps: 1. Navigate to requests tab\n2. View a pending request
Expected Result: Reject button is visible on pending requests

Scenario: Verify user can approve a request
Steps: 1. Click Approve on a pending request\n2. Confirm
Expected Result: Request status changes to Approved

Scenario: Verify user can reject a request with reason
Steps: 1. Click Reject on a pending request\n2. Enter rejection reason\n3. Confirm
Expected Result: Request is rejected and reason is recorded

Scenario: Verify approve and mark as paid together
Steps: 1. Click Approve and Mark as Paid together\n2. Confirm
Expected Result: Request is approved and marked as paid in one step

Scenario: Verify approve first then mark as paid
Steps: 1. Click Approve\n2. Then click Mark as Paid
Expected Result: Request is approved first

Scenario: Verify super admin sees all project sites in dropdown
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check project site dropdown
Expected Result: All project sites with funds are shown in dropdown

Scenario: Verify admin sees only assigned project sites
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check project site dropdown
Expected Result: Only admin's assigned project sites with funds are shown

Scenario: Verify project manager sees own project site funds
Steps: 1. Navigate to petty cash page\n2. Check funds
Expected Result: Only funds from manager's project site are visible

Scenario: Verify team member sees own requests only
Steps: 1. Navigate to requests tab
Expected Result: Only requests assigned to the team member are visible

Scenario: Verify super admin sees all funds
Steps: 1. Navigate to funds tab
Expected Result: All funds from all project sites are visible

Scenario: Verify admin sees assigned site funds only
Steps: 1. Navigate to funds tab
Expected Result: Only funds from admin's assigned project sites are visible

Scenario: Verify super admin sees all transactions
Steps: 1. Navigate to transactions tab
Expected Result: All transactions from all project sites are visible

Scenario: Verify admin sees assigned site transactions
Steps: 1. Navigate to transactions tab
Expected Result: Only transactions from admin's assigned project sites are visible

Scenario: Verify super admin sees all requests
Steps: 1. Navigate to requests tab
Expected Result: All requests from all project sites are visible

Scenario: Verify admin sees assigned site requests
Steps: 1. Navigate to requests tab
Expected Result: Only requests from admin's assigned project sites are visible

Scenario: Negative: Create fund with empty name
Precondition: User is on create fund form
Steps: 1. Click Create Fund\n2. Leave name empty\n3. Click Save
Expected Result: Validation error shown; fund not created

Scenario: Negative: Create fund with zero initial amount
Precondition: User is on create fund form
Steps: 1. Enter fund name\n2. Enter 0 as initial amount\n3. Click Save
Expected Result: Validation error or fund created with 0 balance

Scenario: Edge: Create fund with very long name
Precondition: User is on create fund form
Steps: 1. Enter 255-character fund name\n2. Click Save
Expected Result: Fund created or truncated gracefully

Scenario: Edge: Search with no matching funds
Steps: 1. Enter non-matching search term
Expected Result: Empty state message is displayed

Scenario: Accessibility: Verify heading structure
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Check for h1/h2 headings
Expected Result: h1 "Petty Cash" and other headings present

Scenario: Accessibility: Verify keyboard navigation
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Tab through elements
Expected Result: Elements are reachable via keyboard

Scenario: Regression: Verify page loads after refresh
Precondition: User is on petty cash page
Steps: 1. Refresh the page\n2. Verify content
Expected Result: Page reloads and all tabs/sections are visible
